subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of the All-Merciful! From Iran come successive calamities that cause sorrow and lamentation among the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی از ایران حوادثی متتابع میرسد که سبب تاسف و احزانست و یاران
subcodes.subjects: @Imam Husayn, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @martyrs and martyrdom, @petitions to authorities, @love of God
